sentences.target: Ich bin seit drei Jahren geschieden.

translations.de: Ich bin seit drei Jahren geschieden.
translations.en: I’ve been divorced for three years.
translations.fr: Je suis divorcé depuis trois ans.
translations.ru: Я в разводе уже три года.
translations.vi: Tôi đã ly hôn được ba năm rồi.
translations.nl: Ik ben al drie jaar gescheiden.
translations.hi: मैं तीन साल से तलाकशुदा हूँ.
translations.pl: Jestem po rozwodzie od trzech lat.
translations.el: Είμαι διαζευγμένος εδώ και τρία χρόνια.
translations.nb: Jeg har vært skilt i tre år.
translations.id: Saya sudah bercerai selama tiga tahun.
translations.sv: Jag har varit skild i tre år.
translations.cs: Už tři roky jsem po rozvodu.
translations.da: Jeg har været skilt i tre år.
translations.ja: 離婚して三年になります。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula) in present tense, 1st person singular; links subject to predicative complement.
Preposition governing dative; introduces temporal span ('since/for').
Cardinal numeral modifying 'Jahren'.
Common noun, dative plural; object of the preposition 'seit'.
Predicative adjective (participle used adjectivally) serving as subject complement with 'sein'.

sentences.target: Sie ist geschieden und wohnt allein.

translations.de: Sie ist geschieden und wohnt allein.
translations.en: She is divorced and lives alone.
translations.es: Ella está divorciada y vive sola.
translations.fr: Elle est divorcée et elle vit seule.
translations.it: È divorziata e vive da sola.
translations.pt: Ela é divorciada e mora sozinha.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã ly hôn và sống một mình.
translations.nl: Ze is gescheiden en woont alleen.
translations.hi: वह तलाकशुदा है और अकेली रहती है.
translations.el: Είναι διαζευγμένη και ζει μόνη της.
translations.nb: Hun er skilt og bor alene.
translations.id: Dia sudah bercerai dan tinggal sendiri.
translations.sv: Hon är skild och bor ensam.
translations.ro: Ea este divorțată și locuiește singură.
translations.da: Hun er skilt og bor alene.
translations.fi: Hän on eronnut ja asuu yksin.
translations.ja: 彼女は離婚していて、一人で暮らしています。

tokens.explanation: 3rd person singular feminine nominative personal pronoun; subject.
Finite auxiliary (copula) in present tense, 3rd person singular; links subject to predicative complement.
Predicative adjective complement with 'sein'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicates/clauses.
Main verb, present tense 3rd person singular; head of the second coordinated predicate.
Adverb modifying 'wohnt' (manner).

sentences.target: Mein Vater ist geschieden und wieder verliebt.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ɪst gəˈʃiːdn̩ ʊnt ˈviːdɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/

translations.de: Mein Vater ist geschieden und wieder verliebt.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈfaːtɐ ɪst gəˈʃiːdn̩ ʊnt ˈviːdɐ fɛɐ̯ˈliːpt/
translations.en: My father is divorced and in love again.
translations.es: Mi padre está divorciado y volvió a enamorarse.
translations.fr: Mon père est divorcé et il est de nouveau amoureux.
translations.it: Mio padre è divorziato e si è innamorato di nuovo.
translations.yue: 我老豆離婚咗，又再戀愛喇。
translations.ru: Мой отец разведен и снова влюблён.
translations.pt: Meu pai é divorciado e está apaixonado de novo.
translations.vi: Bố tôi đã ly hôn và lại đang yêu.
translations.nl: Mijn vader is gescheiden en weer verliefd.
translations.uk: Мій батько розлучений і знову закоханий.
translations.hu: Az apám elvált, és újra szerelmes.
translations.hi: मेरे पिता तलाकशुदा हैं और फिर से प्यार में पड़ गए हैं.
translations.pl: Mój tata jest po rozwodzie i znowu zakochany.
translations.el: Ο πατέρας μου είναι διαζευγμένος και ξανά ερωτευμένος.
translations.nb: Faren min er skilt og forelsket igjen.
translations.id: Ayah saya sudah bercerai dan jatuh cinta lagi.
translations.sv: Min pappa är skild och kär igen.
translations.ro: Tatăl meu este divorțat și din nou îndrăgostit.
translations.cs: Můj táta je rozvedený a znovu zamilovaný.
translations.da: Min far er skilt og forelsket igen.
translations.fi: Isäni on eronnut ja taas rakastunut.
translations.ja: 父は離婚していて、また恋をしています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Vater' (masc. sg. nom.); indicates 1st person singular possessor.
Common noun, masculine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula) in present tense, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective complement with 'sein'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two predicate complements.
Adverb modifying the predicative 'verliebt'.
Predicative adjective complement with 'sein' ('ist ... verliebt').

sentences.target: Meine Nachbarin ist geschieden und arbeitet viel.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈnaχbaʁɪn ɪst gəˈʃiːdn̩ ʊnt ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɛt fiːl/

translations.de: Meine Nachbarin ist geschieden und arbeitet viel.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈnaχbaʁɪn ɪst gəˈʃiːdn̩ ʊnt ˈaʁbaɪ̯tɛt fiːl/
translations.en: My neighbor is divorced and works a lot.
translations.es: Mi vecina está divorciada y trabaja mucho.
translations.fr: Ma voisine est divorcée et elle travaille beaucoup.
translations.it: La mia vicina è divorziata e lavora molto.
translations.ko: 우리 이웃은 이혼했고 일을 많이 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的女邻居离婚了，工作很忙。
translations.yue: 我隔籬嗰位女鄰居離婚咗，工作好忙。
translations.ru: Моя соседка разведена и много работает.
translations.pt: Minha vizinha é divorciada e trabalha muito.
translations.vi: Hàng xóm của tôi đã ly hôn và làm việc rất nhiều.
translations.nl: Mijn buurvrouw is gescheiden en werkt veel.
translations.uk: Моя сусідка розлучена і багато працює.
translations.hu: A szomszédnőm elvált, és sokat dolgozik.
translations.hi: मेरी पड़ोसी तलाकशुदा है और बहुत काम करती है.
translations.pl: Moja sąsiadka jest rozwiedziona i dużo pracuje.
translations.el: Η γειτόνισά μου είναι διαζευγμένη και δουλεύει πολύ.
translations.nb: Naboen min er skilt og jobber mye.
translations.id: Tetangga saya sudah bercerai dan bekerja keras.
translations.sv: Min granne är skild och jobbar mycket.
translations.ro: Vecina mea este divorțată și muncește mult.
translations.cs: Moje sousedka je rozvedená a hodně pracuje.
translations.da: Min nabo er skilt og arbejder meget.
translations.fi: Naapurini on eronnut ja tekee paljon töitä.
translations.ja: 近所の女性は離婚していて、たくさん働いています。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Nachbarin' (fem. sg. nom.).
Common noun, feminine nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (copula) in present tense, 3rd person singular.
Predicative adjective complement with 'sein'.

Adverb of degree/quantity modifying 'arbeitet'.
